title: Lead Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
